name: 24"x36" Striped Wall Mirror - Threshold™
description:
Elevate your interiors with this Striped Wall Mirror from Threshold™. This wall mirror features a wooden frame with striped design that makes it an eye-catching focal point on any wall. Easy to mount on the wall using pegs or screws, this striped mirror offers the flexibility to hang it vertically or horizontally for a stunning display.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
